title: The Gate of Justice Looms
description: The Straw Hats’ allies and the enemies aboard the Sea Train trade blows as the rescue closes in on Robin.
scene: Across pages 17, 19, 20, 22, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Sanji, Sogeking. The Straw Hats’ allies and the enemies aboard the Sea Train trade blows as the rescue closes in on Robin.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: So I will assist you for free.

summary: The Straw Hats’ allies and the enemies aboard the Sea Train trade blows as the rescue closes in on Robin.
